title: Vanilla Utilities - Enhanced Mechanics
description: Vanilla enhancing datapack, adds new mechanics, drops and recipes
body:
![Vanilla Utilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d2833bf2a11957789f198ada775da5bc8b65c1.png) 

### This data pack does not add any new blocks or items, but it adds new gameplay mechanics like:
- **New entity interaction**
- **New blocks Interaction**

<details>
<summary>1.20.6 - 1.21+</summary>

## Entity interaction:

### Armor stand Interaction

- **Armor swap**
  
  ![Armor Swap](https://imgur.com/1LoLdxj.gif)

  To swap the armor, simply shift right-click the glowing armor-stand

- **Armor arms**

  ![Armor Arms](https://imgur.com/wq0AHx4.gif)
  
  To add arms to an armor stand, simply right-click on an armor stand without arms with at least 2 sticks
  To remove arms, right-click on an armor stand with arms with less than 62 stick

- **Armor plate**

  ![Armor Plate](https://imgur.com/drz2yVa.gif)


  To remove the plate from an armor stand, simply right-click it with less than 63 smooth stone slabs
  To add the plate, simply right-click it with at least 1 smooth stone slab.

- **Armor invisibility**

  ![Armor Invisibility](https://imgur.com/OAw3eSO.gif)

  To make the armor stand invisible, simply right-click it with a potion of invisibility (3 minutes)
  To make the armor stand visible, simply right-click it with a glass bottle

- **Armor small**
  
  ![Armor small](https://imgur.com/Pdf5ZxA.gif)

  To make the armor stand small, simply right-click it with a potion of weakness (1:30 minutes)
  To make the armor stand tall, simply right-click it with a water bottle

### Item frame Interaction

- **Invisible & visible**

  ![Invisible & Visible](https://imgur.com/RKRu84n.gif)
  
  To make the item frame invisible, simply right-click on it with shears
  To make it visible, simply right-click on it with glow ink sack

### Mobs Interaction

- **Pig saddle**

  ![Pig Saddle](https://imgur.com/6DvROKF.gif)
  
  To take the saddle from a pig, simply shift right-click on it

- **Strider saddle**

  To take the saddle from a strider, simply shift right-click on it

- **Chicken feathers**

  ![Chicken feathers](https://imgur.com/vuHqziT.gif)

  Shift right-clicking a chicken will cause it to drop feathers, but it will take 0.25 hearts of damage per click

- **Cow leather**

  ![Cow Leather](https://imgur.com/kmaLWPW.gif)

  Shift right-clicking a cow with shears will cause it to drop leather, but it will take 2.5 hearts of damage per click

## Block interaction:

### Cauldron Interaction

  ![Cauldron Interaction](https://imgur.com/KkfLpDM.gif)

- **Leaves to moss**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with any type of leaves will give you a moss block and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

- **Moss to slime**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with a moss block will give you a slimeball and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

- **Powder to concrete**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with any type of concrete powder will give you the corresponding type of concrete and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

### Moss Blocks Interaction

  ![Moss Blocks Interaction](https://imgur.com/FueycqF.gif)

- **Moss to stone**

Shift right-clicking a mossy stone brick/mossy cobblestone of any type with shears will change it to its non-mossy state and give you vines.

- **Stone to moss**
  
Shift right-clicking a stone brick/cobblestone of any type with vines will change it to its mossy state

### Anvil Interaction

  ![Anvil Interaction](https://imgur.com/h1G7e9z.gif)

- **Iron repair**
  
Right-clicking a damaged/chipped anvil with an iron block will restore the anvil to its previous state

### Sponge Interaction

  ![Sponge Interaction](https://imgur.com/JZzcHM3.gif)

- **Sponge**
  
Right-clicking a wet sponge with a bucket will change it to sponge and give you a water bucket

### Ladder Interaction

  ![Ladder Interaction](https://imgur.com/8VZ0pJM.gif)

- **Ladder**
  
Right-clicking a ladder with a ladder will place a ladder underneath it

### Beds interaction

  ![Beds Interaction](https://imgur.com/eJebPL7.gif)

- **Banners on beds**
  
Shift right-clicking a bed with a banner will place the banner on the blanket
To remove the banner you need to break the bed
(I can't remove the banner pole from the bed)

### Flowers Interaction

  ![Flowers Interaction](https://imgur.com/BjPSrk3.gif)

- **Small flowers duplication**
  
Right-clicking a small flower with a bone meal will duplicate the flower (sometimes works, just keep right-clicking)

### Powders

  ![Powders](https://imgur.com/eUpEqFm.gif)

- **Gunpowder**
  
Dropping an anvil on a coal block and 8 flints will turn them into gunpowder (from 2 to 8)

- **Glowstone dust**
  
Dropping an anvil on 8 glow berries will turn them into glowstone dust (from 16 to 32)

**!WARNING! Dropping an anvil from more than a few blocks can kill items**

### Pistons

  ![Piston](https://imgur.com/lTfxYIF.gif)

- **Sticky Piston**
  
Right-clicking on a piston with a slimeball makes it sticky

Right-clicking on a sticky piston with shears will turn it into a normal piston

## New Drops

- **Cake**

  ![Cake](https://imgur.com/oglcVvl.gif)

  You can now break a whole or bitten cake


- **Spawner** (1.21 only)

  ![Spawner](https://imgur.com/mIWoeD7.gif)

  You can now break a spawner with a silk touch pickaxe.

# Configuration

You can access config with `/trigger vanilla_utilities.settings`

For Admins, you can disable the trigger with `/function vu:disable_trigger_settings`,
you can re-enable it with `/function vu:enable_trigger_settings`. To access settings do `/function vu:settings`

# Recipes

This datapack also adds 45 new recipes, I recommend using the [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) mod to view them. You can also click on the spoiler below

## Entity interaction:

### Armor stand Interaction

- **Armor swap**
  
  ![Armor Swap](https://imgur.com/1LoLdxj.gif)

  To swap the armor, simply shift right-click the glowing armor-stand

- **Armor arms**

  ![Armor Arms](https://imgur.com/wq0AHx4.gif)
  
  To add arms to an armor stand, simply right-click on an armor stand without arms with at least 2 sticks
  To remove arms, right-click on an armor stand with arms with less than 62 stick

- **Armor plate**

  ![Armor Plate](https://imgur.com/drz2yVa.gif)


  To remove the plate from an armor stand, simply right-click it with less than 63 smooth stone slabs
  To add the plate, simply right-click it with at least 1 smooth stone slab.

- **Armor invisibility**

  ![Armor Invisibility](https://imgur.com/OAw3eSO.gif)

  To make the armor stand invisible, simply right-click it with a potion of invisibility (3 minutes)
  To make the armor stand visible, simply right-click it with a glass bottle

### Item frame Interaction

- **Invisible & visible**

  ![Invisible & Visible](https://imgur.com/RKRu84n.gif)
  
  To make the item frame invisible, simply right-click on it with shears
  To make it visible, simply right-click on it with glow ink sack

### Mobs Interaction

- **Pig saddle**

  ![Pig Saddle](https://imgur.com/6DvROKF.gif)
  
  To take the saddle from a pig, simply shift right-click on it

- **Strider saddle**

  To take the saddle from a strider, simply shift right-click on it

- **Chicken feathers**

  ![Chicken feathers](https://imgur.com/vuHqziT.gif)

  Shift right-clicking a chicken will cause it to drop feathers, but it will take 0.25 hearts of damage per click

- **Cow leather**

  ![Cow Leather](https://imgur.com/kmaLWPW.gif)

  Shift right-clicking a cow with shears will cause it to drop leather, but it will take 2.5 hearts of damage per click

## Block interaction:

### Cauldron Interaction

  ![Cauldron Interaction](https://imgur.com/KkfLpDM.gif)

- **Leaves to moss**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with any type of leaves will give you a moss block and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

- **Moss to slime**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with a moss block will give you a slimeball and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

- **Powder to concrete**

  Right-clicking a water cauldron with any type of concrete powder will give you the corresponding type of concrete and will cause the water in the cauldron to drop a layer

### Moss Blocks Interaction

  ![Moss Blocks Interaction](https://imgur.com/FueycqF.gif)

- **Moss to stone**
Shift right-clicking a mossy stone brick/mossy cobblestone of any type with shears will change it to its non-mossy state and give you vines.

- **Stone to moss**
Shift right-clicking a stone brick/cobblestone of any type with vines will change it to its mossy state

### Anvil Interaction

  ![Anvil Interaction](https://imgur.com/h1G7e9z.gif)

- **Iron repair**
Right-clicking a damaged/chipped anvil with an iron block will restore the anvil to its previous state

### Crying Obsidian Interaction

  ![Crying Obsidian Interaction](https://imgur.com/bCvXQZj.gif)

- **Ender pearl**
Right-clicking a crying obsidian block with a slime block will turn it into some ender pearls (from 1 to 4)

### Sponge Interaction

  ![Sponge Interaction](https://imgur.com/JZzcHM3.gif)

- **Sponge**
Right-clicking a wet sponge with a bucket will change it to sponge and give you a water bucket

### Ladder Interaction

  ![Ladder Interaction](https://imgur.com/8VZ0pJM.gif)

- **Ladder**
Right-clicking a ladder with a ladder will place a ladder underneath it

### Beds interaction

  ![Beds Interaction](https://imgur.com/eJebPL7.gif)

- **Banners on beds**
Shift right-clicking a bed with a banner will place the banner on the blanket
To remove the banner you need to break the bed
(I can't remove the banner pole from the bed)

### Flowers Interaction

  ![Flowers Interaction](https://imgur.com/BjPSrk3.gif)

- **Small flowers duplication**
Right-clicking a small flower with a bone meal will duplicate the flower (sometimes works, just keep right-clicking)

### Powders

  ![Powders](https://imgur.com/eUpEqFm.gif)

- **Gunpowder**
Dropping an anvil on a coal block and 8 flints will turn them into gunpowder (from 2 to 8)

- **Glowstone dust**
Dropping an anvil on 8 glow berries will turn them into glowstone dust (from 16 to 32)

**!WARNING! Dropping an anvil from more than a few blocks can kill items**

### Chain
- Falling blocks
Placing gravity affected blocks under chains keep them from falling
(Bugged)

### Blaze Rod

  ![Blaze Rod](https://imgur.com/U4pCkyY.gif)

- **Blaze rod**
Dropping sticks into lava will turn them into blaze rod after N * 1 minutes (so 5 sticks turn into blaze rod after 5 minutes)

## New Drops

- **Cake**

  ![Cake](https://imgur.com/oglcVvl.gif)

  You can now break a whole or bitten cake


- **Spawner**

  ![Spawner](https://imgur.com/mIWoeD7.gif)

  You can now break a spawner with a silk touch pickaxe.

## Items Highlight

Dropped items will'be highlighted green after 1 minute, yellow after 2.5 minutes and red after 4.5 minutes by default *

# Configuration

Slime ball, ender pearls, blaze rods, spawners and low loot can be disabled/enabled for a player with **/trigger <name of the config>**

For example, if a player called XZTL does **/trigger slime_ball_crafting**, he won't be able to right-click a cauldron with a moss_block

Falling blocks and inverted blankets are globally disabled/enabled

Items Highlight can be configured also with **/trigger items.glowing.<color> set <time in tick>**

For example to set Items Highlight after 1 tick do **/trigger items.glowing.green set 1**
To disable it do **/trigger items.glowing.green set 6001**
